question: A, B, and C are capable of completing a job in 30, 45, and 90 days, respectively. A works every day, while B and C join A every fifth day. How long will it take to finish the task?
The ratio of the efficiencies of two workers, P and Q, is 5 : 2. If P can complete a project in 12 days, how many days will Q take to complete the same project alone?
A and B together can complete a work in 12 days. B and C together can complete the same work in 15 days. C and A together can do it in 20 days. In how many days can A alone complete the job?

A can lay railway track between two specified stations in 16 days, while B can complete the same task in 12 days. When C assists them, they manage to finish the job in just 4 days. How long would it take for C to complete the job on their own?

A can build up a wall in 8 days while B can break it in 3 days. A has worked for 4 days and then B joined to work with A for another 2 days only. In how many days will A alone build up the remaining part of the wall?
A contractor hires 12 workers who can complete a task in 20 days. After 5 days, he fires 3 workers. How many more days will the remaining workers take to complete the task?
A can do a work in 8 days and B in 12 days. They work together for 3 days. What part of the work is left?

A and B can complete a task together in 12 days, while B and C can finish it in 16 days. After A works on it for 5 days and B for 7 days, C takes the remaining 13 days to finish the work. How many days would it take for C to complete the work alone?
A alone can complete a job in 12 days and B alone in 18 days. A and B agree to do the work for Rs 7,200. With C's help they finish it in 5 days. How much should C be paid?
The ratio of the time taken by A and B to complete a task is 3 : 2. If B can complete the task alone in 18 hours, how many hours will they take to complete the task if they work together?
A is three times efficient as a worker than B, which allows A to complete a job in 60 days less than B. If they work together, they can finish the job in:
A and B can complete a task in 12 days and 18 days, respectively. They begin the work together, but B leaves after 4 days. How many more days will A take to finish the remaining work?

A and B can complete a certain task together in 30 days. After A works for 16 days, B is left to finish the remaining work by himself in 44 days. How many days would it take for B to complete the entire task on his own?
A, B, and C can complete a certain task in 20, 30, and 60 days, respectively. How many days will it take for A to finish the work if he receives help from B and C every third day?

A and B can finish a certain job in 28 and 35 days, respectively. They started working together, but A left after a while, and B managed to complete the remaining work in 17 days. How many days did A work before leaving?
A & B together earn Rs840 for a job. A works the whole time; B joins after the job is 25 % done. B is twice as efficient as A. Find B's share.

A contractor employs 15 men to complete a work in 24 days, working 8 hours per day. After six days, he adds five more men but also reduces the working hours to six per day from the seventh day onwards. If all men work with the same efficiency throughout, how many more days will be required to finish the remaining work?
6 women and 4 men can complete a work in 10 days, while 4 women and 5 men complete it in 10 days. In how many days will 8 women complete it?
20 women can do work in 16 days. 10 men can complete the same work in 12 days. What is the ratio between the efficiency of a man and a woman?
A and B can complete a task in 12 days together. A is 25% more efficient than B. What percentage of the work is done by A alone?
Sujit can do a piece of work in 4 days, and Rakesh can do it in 8 days. If they work together for 2 days, how much of the work will be left?
Sameer can complete a work in 16 days. In how many days will the work be completed by Ajay, if his efficiency is 60% more than that of Sameer?
A group of 5 men or 12 women can complete a task in 70 days. Find the time taken by 5 men and 12 women to complete the task.
A machine can fill 120 milk bottles in 6 minutes. How many milk bottles can it fill in 14 minutes?
You earn 52.50 in 3.5 hours. Find your hourly wage as a fraction.
35 men can do a piece of work in 8 days. Find the time required by 16 men to do four times the work.
Dhaval and Dhiraj together can do a piece of work in 12 days. Dhaval alone can do it in 20 days. In how many days can Dhiraj alone do it?
You earn 52.50 in 3.5 hours. Find your hourly wage as a fraction.

Athar can do a certain work in the same time in which Baban and Chetan together can do it. If Athar and Baban together could do it in 10 days and Chetan alone in 50 days, then Baban alone could do it in:
If 15 boys can build a house in 20 days, in how many days can 20 boys complete the same work.
20 men can do a piece of work in 45 days. Find the percentage amount of work done by 60 men in 6 days.
If 10 men or 15 women can complete a work in 170 days, how long will 20 men and 20 women take for completing the same work?
Sudarshan can copy 50 pages in 10 hours; Sudarshan and Prakash together can copy 300 pages in 40 hours. In how much time can Prakash copy 25 pages?

Instructions: Evaluate the following statements to determine if the information provided is sufficient to answer the question. Question : If P, Q, and R work together, how many days will they take to complete a project? Statement I : Q and R together can complete the project in 10 days. Statement II : P and R together can complete the project in 15 days. its own is sufficient. question.
options: Statement I alone provides enough information to answer the question, but Statement II alone does not.
Statement II alone provides enough information to answer the question, but Statement I alone does not.
Both Statement I and Statement II combined are needed to answer the question, as neither statement on
Even when combined, the information in both Statement I and Statement II is not enough to answer the

question: A can complete a task in 15 days, and B can complete the same task in 20 days. How long will it take them to complete the task together?

The efficiency of A, B and C is 2 : 3 : 5. A alone can complete the work in 40 days. They all worked together for 5 days and then C left the work. In how many days can A and B together complete the remaining work?
A, B, and C together can complete a task in 6 days. If A alone takes 12 days and B alone takes 18 days, how long will C alone take?
66 women can do a piece of work in 79 days. Find the number of days required by 6 women to complete 1/11th of the work.

Lalit can finish a work in 15 days. Laxman can finish the same work in 25 days. They work together for 5 days. If the rest of the work is finished by Lalit and Deven in 4 days, then in how many days can Deven alone finish the work?

A can complete a task in 30 days, and B can complete the same task in 40 days. They work together for 10 days, and then C joins them and completes the remaining work in 5 days. How long will C alone take to complete the task?

P and Q can do a piece of work in 20 days and 30 days, respectively. They work together for 6 days, and then Q is replaced by R. If the rest of the work is completed by P and R in 8 more days, in how many days can R alone complete 60% of the work?
A and B together can do a piece of work in 10 days. B alone can do it in 15 days. How long will A alone take to complete the work? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 3]

A takes 12 days to finish a job, while B takes 36 days to complete the same job. If they collaborate, how many days will it take them to complete the work together? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 13 Nov Shift 1]
A can do a work in 15 days, B in 30 days. They start together but A leaves after 5 days. In how many more days will B complete the remaining work? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]
A, B, C together finish a job in 8 days. A and B together take 12 days, while B and C together take 16 days. In how many days can C alone finish the job?
A can do a work in 15 days, B in 30 days. They start together but A leaves after 5 days. In how many more days will B complete the remaining work? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]
A alone can do a job in 12 days, B alone in 24 days. They work together for 4 days, then A leaves. In how many more days will B finish the job?
A can do a work in 18 days, B in 27 days. They start together, but after 6 days A leaves. In how many more days will B finish the remaining work?

A man and a boy received Rs. 600 as wages for 5 days for the work they did together. The man's efficiency in the work was twice that of the boy. What are the daily wages of the boy? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-1]

If 4 women and 6 girls can do a piece of work in 12 days, while 24 women and 46 girls can do the same in 2 days, how much time will 15 women and 20 girls do the same type of work? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-2]

Amit can finish the work in 15 days, and Baban can finish the same work in 25 days. They work together for 5 days. The rest of the work was finished by Amit and Chetan in 4 days. How much time is required for Chetan to finish this work? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-3]

A can do a certain work in the same time that B and C together can do it. If A and B together could do it in 10 days and C alone in 40 days, then A alone could do it in: [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-3]

A can finish the work in 16 days, and B can do the same work in 12 days. B worked for 8 days and left the job. In how many days will A alone finish the remaining work? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-3]

A can complete the work in 12 days, B in 15 days, and C in 20 days. They work in the following manner: On the first day A works, on the second day B works, on the third day C works. The cycle repeats in the same order. In how many days will the work be completed? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-3]

A construction project was estimated to be completed in 180 days. Due to rain, only 60% of the days were productive. If the work done each productive day is constant, by what percent must the crew increase their speed to complete the project on time?
4 boys and 6 girls can complete the work in 8 days, while 3 boys and 7 girls can complete it in 10 days. In how many days will 10 girls complete it?
If 8 men can do a piece of work in 14 days, the time taken by 12 men to do the same piece of work will be:
A does 60% of the work in 18 days. He then calls in B, and they together finish the remaining work in 4 days. How long would B alone take to do the whole work?
A and B together can complete a job in 8 days. If A alone can do it in 16 days, how many days will B alone take?
A and B can complete a work in 6 days together. If A alone can do it in 12 days, how many days will B alone take?
Sonu and Monu together can do a piece of work in 30 days. If Sonu is 20% less efficient than Monu, in how many days can Sonu, working alone, complete 40% of the work?
18 men can complete a work in 20 days. After 10 days, 6 men leave. In how many more days will the remaining men finish the work?
A and B together can complete a task in 15 days. If A alone can complete the task in 25 days, how long will B take to complete the task alone?
A can complete a work in 8 days, while B can do it in 16 days. How many days will they take together?
Given, 6 men and 8 boys can complete the task in 10 days, and 26 men and 48 boys can finish it in just 2 days, how long will it take for 15 men and 20 boys to do the same work?
A can do a job in 12 days, B can do the same job in 8 days. How long will they take together?
A and B together do a piece of work in 10 days. B alone does it in 15 days. How long will A take alone?
A can complete a job in 15 days and B in 20 days. They work together for 5 days. How much work is left?
A can do a work in 10 days, B in 15 days, and C in 30 days. If all three work together for 3 days and then A leaves, in how many more days will the remaining work be finished?
A and B together can complete a job in 10 days. A alone can complete it in 15 days. How long will B take to complete the work alone?
A and B together finish a job in 9 days. If A alone takes 18 days, how many days will B alone take?

Mohit and Rohit undertook a work for Rs. 6600. Mohit alone can do that work in 25 days. Rohit alone can do the same work in 30 days. They work together. What will be the difference in the amount (in Rs.) they receive?
P and Q working alone can complete a work in 5 days and 15 days respectively. They work on alternate days one at a time. P works on the first day. In how many days the whole work will be completed?
38 men can do a piece of work in 10 days. Find the time required by 10 men to do thrice the work.

P and Q together can complete a work in 24 days. They started the work together but after 8 days P left the work. Remaining work is completed by Q in 20 more days. P alone can complete this entire work in how many days?
P and Q working alone can complete a work in 12 days and 24 days respectively. They work on alternate days one at a time. P works on the first day. In how many days the whole work will be completed?
A and B together can do a job in 6 days. A alone does it in 9 days. In how many days can B alone do it?
P and Q working alone can complete a work in 9 days and 18 days respectively. They work on alternate days one at a time. P works on the first day. In how many days the whole work will be completed?
Aditya is twice as good a workman as Bipin and therefore can finish a job in 30 days less than Bipin. How many days are required to complete the job if working together?

A and B can complete a work in 12 days, B and C can complete the same work in 15 days. A, B, and C together can complete the work in 10 days. How long will it take for A and C together to complete the work?
A can do a work in 12 days and B in 16 days. They work together for 4 days, then A leaves. In how many more days will B finish the work?
A does 1/3 of work in 10 days, B completes 1/4 of the same work in 5 days. Who is more efficient and by what percentage?
A and B together can complete a work in 12 days. B and C together can complete it in 15 days. C and A together in 20 days. How many days will each take working alone?
A and B together can do a piece of work in 20 days. They worked for 8 days, and C completed the remaining in 4 days. How long will C alone take to do the whole work?
A can do a job in 10 days and B in 12 days. They work on alternate days starting with A. In how many days will the job be finished?

A can complete a task in 10 days, while B can finish the same task in 12 days. They decide to work alternately, with A starting the work on the first day. How many days will it take for them to complete the task?
A can do a piece of work in 20 days and B in 30 days. They work together for 5 days. How much work is left?

P, Q and R working alone can complete a work in 24, 30 and 40 days respectively. All three of them started the work together but after 8 days P left the work. Q left the work 6 days before the work was completed. R completed the remaining work alone. In how many days was the total work completed?
A is twice as efficient as B, A and B together can complete a work in 12 days. In how many days can A alone complete the work?

P, Q and R working alone can complete a work in 15, 20 and 30 days respectively. All three of them started the work together but after 4 days P left the work. Q left the work 6 days before the work was completed. R completed the remaining work alone. In how many days was the total work completed?
A alone can do a work in 20 days, B alone in 30 days. They work together for 6 days, then A leaves. How many more days will B take to finish the remaining work?

A is capable of completing a task in 10 days, while B can finish the same task in 15 days. A works alone for the first 4 days and is then joined by B. How many total days will it take to complete the entire task?
Sudhir can copy 40 pages in 8 hours; Sudhir and Prakash together can copy 350 pages in 35 hours. In how much time can Prakash copy 40 pages?
If 8 workers can build a wall in 10 days, how many days will 4 workers take to build the same wall?
A can do a certain work in the same time that B and C together can do it. If A and B together could do it in 10 days and B alone in 25 days, then C alone could do it in:

A can complete a task in 10 days and B can finish a task in 15 days respectively. A starts the work and works for 4 days, after which B joins A. How many more days will they take to complete the task? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 2]
A can do a piece of work in 18 days, while B can do it in 24 days. They work together for 6 days, after which A leaves. In how many more days will B complete the remaining work?
A machine processes 2.4 items per second. How many items does it process in 2 minutes?
If A works twice as fast as B, and A can complete a task in 10 days, how many days will it take for B to complete the task?
A can complete a task in 12 days and B in 18 days. If they work together, how long will they take to complete the task?
Rani can complete a stitching order in 24 days. After working for 6 days, her sister joins her, and they finish it in 10 more days. In how many days can her sister alone complete the work?
A and B together can do a piece of work in 8 days. B and C can do it in 12 days, and C and A can do it in 16 days. In how many days can A alone do the work?
Prakash can do a job in 15 days. In how many days can Prakash and Jayesh together complete the job, if Jayesh is twice as fast as Prakash?
A and B together can do a piece of work in 20 days. A worked for 15 days and left. B finished the remaining work alone in 42 days. In how many days could B finish the whole work alone?
A and B can complete a task in 12 days together. A is 25% more efficient than B. What percentage of the work is done by A alone?
A, B, and C together can complete a task in 10 days. A alone takes 20 days, and B alone takes 30 days. How long will C alone take?
X can complete a work in 2 days and Y in 4 days. How long will it take them to finish the work if they work together?
A small construction firm has 6 workers who can complete a road patching job in 8 days. If 4 more workers are added, how many days will they take to finish the same work?
5 men or 8 women can do a job in 12 days. In how many days will 10 men and 4 women together complete the same job?
A, B and C can do a piece of work in 20, 30 and 50 days, respectively. In how many days can A do the work, if he is assisted by B and C on every second day?
Raju and Pintu together can clean a garden in 10 hours. If Raju alone can do it in 15 hours, how many hours will Pintu alone take?
A and B together can complete a railway sleeper alignment in 10 days. B alone can do it in 15 days. In how many days can A alone complete the work?
A job can be done by 18 women in 10 days. After working for 4 days, 6 women leave. How many more days will the remaining women take to finish the job?
20 girls can complete a work in 16 days. 16 boys can complete the same work in 15 days. What is the ratio between the capacity of a boy and a girl?
A can complete a work in 12 days, B in 18 days, and C in 24 days. They start together, but C leaves after 4 days. How many more days will A and B take to finish the remaining work?
A can do a work in 15 days, B in 20 days. If they work alternately starting with A, how many days to finish the work?
A can do the work in 10 days, B in 15 days. They work together for 3 days, then A leaves. How many more days will B take?
A can do a work in 12 days, B in 18 days, C in 36 days. If they work together for 3 days, then A leaves, how many more days will B and C take?
A is twice as efficient as B. Together they finish a job in 12 days. How long will B take alone?
A can do a work in 8 days, B in 12 days, C in 24 days. How many days will they take together?
A certain amount of work can be done by 46 men in 16 days. How many days will 32 men require for the same work?
Ashutosh is 3 times as efficient as Sonali. Together they can complete a work in 15 days. How many days will Sonali alone take?

A team of 7 software developers can complete a mobile app project in 12 days. They begin working on it, but after 5 days, 2 developers are reassigned to another task. How many more days will the remaining developers take to finish the project?
Ashmit, Bhuwan, and Chandar can complete a piece of work in 15, 20, and 30 days respectively. Working together, in how many days can they complete the work?
Amit can do a piece of work in 30 days. Babli can do it in 45 days. In how many days can Amit and Babli together do the same work?

In a warehouse, a team of 5 packers (men) and 2 helpers (boys) can pack three times as many boxes in a day as one packer and one helper can together. What is the ratio of the packing capacity of a packer to a helper?

A mural artist can complete painting a square wall in hours. His assistant is slower and takes twice as long to do the same work. How many hours would the assistant take to paint the entire wall on his own?

Worker A requires days to level and prepare a school playground, while worker B can complete the same task in days. When A, B, and a third worker C collaborate, they finish the job in  days. Assuming each works at a steady pace, how long will it take worker C to complete the work alone?

A, B C : 9, 12 18 A, B C तथा अकेले कार्य करके एक कार्य को क्रमश तथा दिनों में पूरा कर सकते हैं। तथा ? मिलकर उसी कार्य को कितने दिनों में पूरा कर सकते हैं En: A, B and C working alone can complete a work in 9, 12 and 18 days respectively. In how many days A, B and C together can complete the same work?

A B 6600 A 25 B तथा ने एक कार्य को रुपये में लिया। अकेले उस कार्य को दिनों में कर सकता है। अकेले उसी 30 रा कार्य को दिनों में कर सकता है। वे साथ मिलकर कार्य शुरू तथा खत्म करते हैं। उन्हें प् ाप्त होने वाली राशियों में ( ) ? अंतर रुपये में क्या होगा En: A and B undertook a work for Rs. 6600. A alone can do that work in 25 days. B alone can do the same work in 30 days. They started and completed the work together. What will be the difference in the amounts (in Rs.) they will receive?
A alone can complete 40 percent part of a work in 8 days. What part of this work will be completed by A alone in 15 days?

A and B are employed in a work. A worked for 6 days and B worked for 4 days. Per day work of A and B is 3 units and 5 units respectively. A and B received total wages of Rs. 4408. What is the difference between shares (in Rs.) of A and B?
Q and R together are 3 times as efficient as P. P and R together are 2.5 times as efficient as Q. Q and R together can complete a work in 60 days. P alone can complete the same work in how many days?
A alone can complete 30 percent part of a work in 6 days. What part of this work will be completed by A alone in 10 days?
Q and R together are 5 times as efficient as P. P and R together are 3 times as efficient as Q. Q and R together can complete a work in 45 days. P alone can complete the same work in how many days?

A alone can do a work in 15 days. B alone can do the same work in 25 days. C alone can do the same work in 50 days. They started the work together. A and B both left the work after 5 days. In how many days can C complete the remaining work?
P and Q together can complete a work in 12 days. R alone can complete the same work in 18 days. P, Q and R together can complete part of the same work in how many days?
A, B and C working alone can complete a work in 8, 12 and 24 days respectively. In how many days A, B and C together can complete the same work?
Q and R together are 2 times as efficient as P. P and R together are 1.5 times as efficient as Q. Q and R together can complete a work in 90 days. In how many days P alone can complete the same work?
R did 2/3 part of a work on first day. He did 1/4 part of the remaining work on second day. Now the remaining work is 20 units. What is the total work (in units)?
P and Q together can complete a work in 12 days. R alone can complete the same work in 18 days. P, Q and R together can do the same work in how many days?

Q and R together are 8 times as efficient as P. P and R together are 5 times as efficient as Q. P, Q and R together can complete a work in 10 days. Q alone can complete the same work in how many days?

900 60 6 300 एक समूह में पुरुष हैं। उनके पास दिनों का भोजन है। दिन पश्चात पुरुष समूह छोड़कर चले गए। शेष ? भोजन कितने दिनों तक चलेगा En: A group has 900 men. They have food for 60 days. After 6 days, 300 men left the group. For how many more days will the remaining food last?

A B C किसी कार्य को पूरा करने में की तुलना में दो गुना समय लेता है। उसी कार्य को पूरा करने में को उतना ही समय A B A 60 A, B लगता है जितना तथा को मिलकर लगता है। अकेले एक कार्य को दिनों में पूरा कर सकता है। तथा C ? मिलकर उसी कार्य को कितने दिनों में पूरा कर सकते हैं En: A takes twice as long as B to complete a work. C takes same time as A and B together take to complete a work. A alone can complete a work in 60 days. A, B and C together can complete the same work in how many days?
A alone can complete 50 percent part of a work in 10 days. What part of this work will be completed by A alone in 7 days?
P and Q together can complete a work in 20 days. R alone can complete the same work in 30 days. P, Q and R together can do the same work in how many days?
S alone can complete part of a work in 16 days. R is 4 times as efficient as S. In how many days will R alone complete the same total work?
40 men can build a wall in 50 days working 9 hours per day. How many men will be required to build the same wall in 75 days working 6 hours per day?

6 men can complete a work in 18 days. 8 women can complete the same work in 12 days. 5 boys can complete the same work in 20 days. In how many days 10 boys, 12 men and 16 women together will complete the same work?
There are 1000 men in a group. They have food for 60 days. After 10 days, 500 men left the group. For how many days will the remaining food last?

X alone can do a piece of work in 10 days. Y alone can do the same work in 15 days. Z alone can do the same work in 30 days. All three together complete the work. Out of the total wages received by X, Y and Z, the wage received by X is Rs.8000. What is the total wage received by Y and Z (in rupees)?
P and Q together can complete a work in 8 days. R alone can complete the same work in 16 days. P, Q and R together can complete part of the same work in how many days?
R alone can complete a work in 24 days. S alone can complete the same work in 36 days. They work together for 8 days. What part of total work is left?
30 men working 9 hours per day can build a wall in 40 days. How many men will be required to build the same wall working 6 hours per day in 60 days?
A is 6 times as good a workman as B. A and B together can finish a work in 18 days. In how many days will B alone complete the same work?
50 men can build a wall in 30 days working 6 hours per day. How many men will be required to build the same wall in 45 days working 4 hours per day?

A takes four times as long as B to complete a work. C takes same time as A and B together take to complete a work. A alone can complete a work in 80 days. A, B and C together can complete the same work in how many days?
M alone can complete a work in 40 days. N alone can complete the same work in 80 days. Both work together. In 8 days, what percentage of total work will be completed?
P and Q together can complete a work in 9 days. R alone can complete the same work in 18 days. In how many days can P, Q, and R together complete 1/6 part of the same work?
12 men can complete a wall construction in 15 days. After 6 days, 4 men leave. Find how many more days the remaining men will take to finish the remaining work.

3 men can complete a work in 12 days. 4 women can complete the same work in 8 days. 6 boys can complete the same work in 18 days. In how many days will 12 boys, 6 men and 8 women together complete the same work?
15 men can complete a work in 40 days. How many men can complete (1/2) part of the same work in 20 days?

M and R together can do a work in 8 days. R and P together can do the same work in 6 days. P and M together can do the same work in 12 days. Working together, how much part of work can they do in 3 days?
A, B and C together can complete a work in 18 days. A and B together can complete the same work in 24 days. C alone can complete the same work in how many days?

X alone can do a work in 12 days. Y alone can do the same work in 18 days. Z alone can do the same work in 36 days. All three together complete the work. Wages received by X out of total wages received by X, Y and Z are Rs. 4800. What is the absolute difference (in Rs.) between the total wages of Y and Z and total wages of X and Z?

A and B can finish the work in 10 days and 15 days, respectively. They start working together. After 3 days, A leaves. How many days will B take to finish the remaining work? What is the total number of days taken to complete the entire work?

R1 alone can do a work in 18 days working 6 hours a day. R2 alone can do the same work in 12 days working 9 hours per day. Working 6 hours per day, in how many days both R1 and R2 together can complete the same work?
R is 40 percent more efficient than S. S alone can finish a work in 35 days. In how many days will R alone finish the same work?

R alone can do a work in 10 days working 3 hours a day. S alone can do the same work in 6 days working 5 hours a day. How many hours do they need to work together in a day to complete the same work in 4 days?
A, B and C working alone can complete a work in 10, 15 and 30 days respectively. In how many days A, B and C together can complete 30 percent of the same work?
10 women can do half part of the total work in 20 days. How many more women will be required to complete the remaining work in 4 days?
A, B and C working alone can complete a work in 18, 27 and 36 days respectively. In how many days A, B and C together can complete part of the same work?

A and B undertook a work for Rs. 4200. A alone can do the work in 21 days. B alone can do the work in 28 days. They start and finish the work together. What will be the difference (in Rs.) in the amounts received by them?
A, B and C working alone can complete a piece of work in 14, 21 and 42 days respectively. In how many days can A, B and C together complete the same work?

5 men can complete a work in 15 days. 6 women can complete the same work in 10 days. 4 boys can complete the same work in 12 days. In how many days can 8 boys, 10 men and 12 women together complete the same work?
A and B can complete the work in 15 days and 20 days, respectively. They start together, but every 3rd day, B is absent. In how many days will the work be completed?

A, B, and C can do a job in 12, 15, and 20 days, respectively. All three work together for 4 days. Then A leaves; B and C continue, but at only 3/4 of their normal daily hours. How many more days are needed to finish?
R is 33.33 percent more efficient than S. S alone can finish a work in 24 days. In how many days will R alone finish the same work?
A can do a job in 20 days, B in 30 days. They work on alternate days, with A starting the job. In how many days is the job finished?
P is 6 times as efficient as R. What is the ratio of time taken by P and R alone to complete the same work?

A and B are employed in a work. A worked for 7 days and B worked for 5 days. Per day work of A and B is 2 units and 4 units respectively. Share of A out of total wages received by A and B is Rs. 4900. What is the share (in Rs.) of B?
A and B can do a piece of work in 12 days and 18 days, respectively. They work on alternate days, starting with A. How many days will it take to complete the work?
R did 7/10 part of a work on first day. He did 2/3 part of the remaining work on second day. If the total work is 90 units, then how much work (in units) is remaining now?

R alone can do a work in 6 days working 5 hours a day. S alone can do the same work in 4 days working 8 hours a day. How many hours do they need to work together in a day to complete the same work in 3 days?
A, B and C working alone can complete a work in 12, 15 and 20 days respectively. In how many days A, B and C together can complete 20 percent of the same work?
A alone can do a work in 24 days. B alone can do the same work in 36 days. B alone started the work and worked for 18 days. In how many days A alone can finish the remaining work?
A alone can complete 25 percent part of a work in 20 days. A alone will complete 60 percent part of the same work in how many days?

M and R together can do a work in 20 days. R and P together can do the same work in 30 days. P and M together can do the same work in 60 days. Working together, how much part of work can they do in 5 days?
16 men can complete (3/4) part of a work in 12 days. How many men can complete 1/2 part of the same work in 8 days?
A alone can do a work in 15 days. B alone can do the same work in 25 days. B alone started the work and worked for 10 days. In how many days A alone can finish the remaining work?

A and B can complete a job together in 18 days; A alone takes 30 days. They worked together some days, then A left; B finished the rest. The total time was 20 days. For how many days did they work together?
10 men can complete a work in 30 days. How many men can complete (1/2) part of the same work in 15 days?

X alone can do a work in 15 days. Y alone can do the same work in 20 days. Z alone can do the same work in 30 days. All three together completed the work. Wages received by X out of total wages received by X, Y and Z are Rs. 6000. What are total wages (in Rs.) received by Y and Z?
S alone can complete 7/8 part of a work in 21 days. R is 2 times as efficient as S. In how many days will R alone complete the same total work?
M and R together can do a work in 18 days. R and P together can do the same work in 24 days. P and M together can do the same work in 36 days. In how many days can P alone do the same work?
M and S working alone can complete a work in 20 days and 25 days respectively. They received Rs 4500 for completing the work together. What is the share (in Rs.) of M?

X alone can do a work in 12 days. Y alone can do the same work in 18 days. Z alone can do the same work in 36 days. All three together complete the work. Wages received by X out of total wages received by X, Y and Z are Rs. 7200. What are total wages (in Rs.) received by Y and Z?
A, B and C together can complete a work in 20 days. A and B together can complete the same work in 25 days. C alone can complete (4/9) of the same work in how many days?
24 men can complete a work in 90 days. 36 men will complete 50 percent of the same work in how many days?
A is 4 times as good a workman as B. A and B together can finish a work in 20 days. In how many days will B alone complete the same work?

A alone can do a work in 15 days. B alone can do the same work in 20 days. C alone can do the same work in 30 days. They started the work together. B left after 2 days. A and C together completed the remaining work. In how many days remaining work was completed?
A can lay a stretch of track in 8 days, B in 10 days. They undertake the work for Rs 3,600. With C joining them, the job is finished in 4 days. How much should C receive?
